Notice Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing On Pltf'S Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

William C. Acevedo, Esq., and Leonard E. Marquez, appearing for Plaintiff, HC HOSPITALITY INVESTMENT, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) KKONA HI HOSPITALITY GROUP, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.
Ed Kim sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Defendants Does 1-10 ordered dismissed without prejudice.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $7,312.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $10,478.00
Costs: $305.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $18,096.00
Judgment signed in open court.
